label: Journalism & Media
description: Source pack for tracking recurring operational, editorial, business, and distribution pain points across journalism and media.

focus_rotation.label: Revenue & Monetization
focus_rotation.description: Paywall fatigue, ad revenue decline, subscription churn, and new funding models.

focus_rotation.label: Trust & Misinformation
focus_rotation.description: Fact-checking gaps, audience trust erosion, and verification challenges.

focus_rotation.label: Tooling & Workflow
focus_rotation.description: CMS friction, collaboration issues, production bottlenecks, and publishing workflows.

focus_rotation.label: Distribution & Audience
focus_rotation.description: Platform dependence, algorithm shifts, audience growth, and discovery.

focus_rotation.label: Local Journalism
focus_rotation.description: Funding deserts, community engagement, local sustainability, and civic information gaps.

focus_rotation.label: AI & Automation in Newsrooms
focus_rotation.description: Adoption friction, newsroom automation, ethics questions, and productivity tradeoffs.

focus_rotation.label: Freelance & Independent Media
focus_rotation.description: Payment issues, discoverability, legal support, and business infrastructure for independents.

focus_rotation.label: Press Freedom & Safety
focus_rotation.description: Threats, legal protection, harassment, and digital security for journalists.
